{{CargoOrgan
|name=Tail of Cataclysm
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10719
|idx=77
|description="The Federation's expeditionary force was erased in an instant—we didn’t even see It move! When crimson rain began to fall from the sky… it was already too late."
— Demon King's Revelation
|skill=On combat start, launch a spiral fighting spiritual cannon, dealing DMG equal to 120% of ATK, and reducing the enemy's ATK by 6% this round!
|hp=1760
|def=390
|atk=250
|rush=254
|gene1=Snail Arena, Earth DMG +240
|gene2=Snail Arena, Lifesteal Rate +40%
|gene3=Per 30 Star Coins redeemed, {race} DEF +70
Star Coin Redeems: 90/90
|gene4=Each round, {race} DEF +80
|gene5=Earth DMG +120
|gene6=Snail Arena, dodge rate +12%
|gene7=Snail Arena, dodge rate +12% (Awakened)
|}}
